regions.text: a bed, a bag, a sock, a stocking, a shoe, a hairbrush, a toothbrush, a comb, a key, a lock, a hairpin, a fork, an engine, a plate, two pins, a pen, rails, a card, a stamp, a flame, a frame, a hook, a book, a bell, a bottle, a glove
Eighteen. Sixty. Forty-three. Five hundred and seven. We put his street under his name and we put the name of the town under the name of the street. And under that we put the name of the state.
The sun comes up in the East and goes down in the West. Yes, day comes after night. Yes, night comes after day. The teacher's work is teaching.
